# viettelidc_vks_security_group (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving details of a single VKS Cluster Security Group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `sg_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
